en: Climate protection in Germany: The government does not protect citizens. Black-Red clearly overestimates the impact of the planned climate measures. Not to mention the planned anti-climate measures.
la: Tutela climatis in Germania: Imperium cives non protegit. Nigrum-Rubrum evidenter aestimat impulsum mensurarum climatis cogitavit. Ut taceam de remediis cogitavit anti-caeli.

en: Class action lawsuit in Sweden: Climate activists sue the state. Environmentalists from Sweden, Norway and Germany have filed a class action lawsuit. This is not directly about climate protection.
la: Classis actio litis in Suecia: actores climatis de re publica petenda sunt. Environmentales ex Suetia, Norvegia et Germania genus causae actionis interposuerunt. Hoc non directe circa tutelam climatis est.
